fresh_facts.claim: The United States deployed approximately 2,200-2,500 Marines to the Middle East, with a Marine expeditionary unit aboard three US Navy amphibious ships ordered to the region.
War Secretary Pete Hegseth approved the deployment request from US Central Command for Marines to the Middle East.
The USS Tripoli, a Japan-based amphibious assault ship, is heading toward the Middle East as part of US reinforcement operations.

The Israeli Air Force carried out approximately 7,600 strikes over a two-week period, including over 2,000 strikes on Iranian regime headquarters and 4,700 strikes against the Iranian missile program.
The IDF reported eliminating between 4,000 and 5,000 Iranian soldiers during the two-week operational period.
Israel has carried out over 400 waves of strikes on Iranian targets.
Israeli Defense Minister Israel Katz stated that the war against Iran has entered a 'decisive stretch' that will continue as long as necessary.
Israel is preparing for a major ground operation in Lebanon against Hezbollah.
The IDF has eliminated over 380 Hezbollah terrorists.
Iran and Hezbollah are launching ongoing missile attacks on Israel from north to south, with air raid sirens sounding across Jerusalem, Tel Aviv, and Eilat.
Iran is using cluster bombs in its latest missile salvos against Israel.
The Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed due to Iranian missile and drone attacks.
The Iranian government reported more than 2,000 people killed since the start of the war.
The White House reported a 95% decrease in Iranian drone attacks since the war's start.
The United States reports striking over 6,000 targets in the conflict.
Over 90 Iranian vessels have been sunk or destroyed according to US reports.
The conflict is in its 14th day as of March 13, 2026.
The US government is offering up to $10 million for information on Iranian leaders.
American death toll stands at 13, with six service members killed aboard a refueling flight that crashed in Iraq and four US soldiers killed in a refueling aircraft collision in western Iraq.
President Trump has not ruled out putting American boots on the ground in the war against Iran.
Mojtaba Khamenei issued his first statement as Supreme Leader on March 12, 2026, following his official appointment by the Assembly of Experts on March 8.
Ali Khamenei, the previous Supreme Leader, was killed in a U.S.-Israel strike on February 28, 2026.
An elite counterterrorism unit known as NOPO has been deployed to protect the new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei.
Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf and Defense Council Secretary Ali Shamkhani are maneuvering to consolidate power in the post-succession period.
The Defense Council, established after the Israel-Iran War, now operates independently of the Supreme National Security Council, a development approved by Ali Khamenei.
The European Union approved new sanctions on March 11 targeting 19 Iranian officials and entities for serious human rights violations.
EU Foreign Policy Chief Kaja Kallas stated that EU sanctions send 'a message to Tehran that Iran's future cannot be built on repression.'
The IRGC announced a new wave of attacks described as the 37th round of 'True Promise 4,' including missile barrages toward Israeli targets and strikes linked to U.S. facilities in the region.
Iran is experiencing 'the most dramatic upheaval since the 1979 Islamic Revolution,' with economic collapse and political frustration mounting.
U.S. intelligence assessments suggest the Iranian regime's core power structures are likely to survive despite current pressures.

regime_fall.current_status: Massive escalation in military operations with US-Israeli combined forces conducting unprecedented bombing campaigns (7,600+ Israeli strikes, 6,000+ US targets, 15,000+ total targets including Kharg Island), ground force deployments accelerating (2,500 Marines deployed, 5,000 additional en route), while new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei attempts regime consolidation amid cascading military degradation and internal power struggles between Ghalibaf and Shamkhani. Iran responding with continued 'True Promise' missile attacks and cluster munitions despite 95% reduction in drone capability and 90+ vessels destroyed.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Israeli Air Force completed 400+ waves of strikes including 7,600 total strikes (2,000+ on regime headquarters, 4,700+ on missile program) with reported 4,000-5,000 Iranian soldiers eliminated, while US Central Command deployed 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit and announced deployment of additional 5,000 sailors and Marines.
